name: Belle-Ile & Brittany
blurb: A week on the wild Atlantic coast. Clifftop walking on the GR34 around the Crozon peninsula, then five days circling Belle-Ile-en-Mer on the GR 340.

title: Belle-Ile & Brittany
notes: A week on the wild Atlantic coast. Clifftop walking on the GR34 around the Crozon peninsula, then five days circling Belle-Ile-en-Mer on the GR 340. The western cliffs of Belle-Ile in evening light are the kind of view that stays with you.
